one_liner: Ramp provides a comprehensive API for financial management and automation, supporting OAuth2 and API Key authentication.
gating_notes: Apply for access at https://agents.ramp.com/cards.
agent_notes: OAuth2 is confirmed in the Authorization section, and API Key is implied by the need for API access. Access to certain features like Agent Cards requires application, indicating gating. The API is broad with multiple endpoints and supports MCP.

one_liner: PitchBook provides comprehensive private market data and insights through its API.
gating_notes: API access requires a standalone contract agreement.
agent_notes: The API requires a standalone contract agreement, indicating a need for partnership or sales contact. Only API Key authentication is mentioned, with no reference to OAuth2.

one_liner: NotebookLM Enterprise provides APIs for managing notebooks and generating insights from documents.
gating_notes: API access requires licenses for NotebookLM Enterprise.
agent_notes: OAuth2 is mentioned in the context of using Bearer tokens for API requests. Access requires setting up NotebookLM Enterprise and obtaining licenses, indicating a gated access model.

one_liner: Otter AI provides a public API for accessing conversations, transcripts, and more, primarily for enterprise users.
gating_notes: API access is available for all Enterprise workspaces. If you do not see this feature for your workspace, contact your Otter account manager.
agent_notes: The API is only available for enterprise workspaces, requiring contact with an account manager. Authentication is via API Key, with no mention of OAuth2.

one_liner: Fathom provides AI-powered meeting notes and summaries with integration capabilities.
gating_notes: Get Started. It’s Free.
agent_notes: OAuth2 is confirmed in the SDK documentation. API Key generation is mentioned in the Quickstart Guide. The service offers free access without needing to contact sales.

one_liner: Consensus is an AI-powered tool for automating and enhancing academic research.
gating_notes: API access requires partnership with university libraries or organizations.
agent_notes: No specific API documentation or authentication methods were found. Access appears to be through partnerships with institutions.

one_liner: Reducto is an agentic document platform for AI teams, offering advanced document parsing and extraction capabilities.
gating_notes: Go to studio.reducto.ai and sign up for a free account. In the Studio sidebar, click API Keys, then Create new API key.
agent_notes: API Key authentication is confirmed in the quickstart guide. Developers can sign up for a free account and generate an API key without contacting sales, indicating self-serve access.

one_liner: Devin is an AI software engineer that automates coding tasks for engineering teams.
gating_notes: API access available with service user API keys; Personal Access Tokens in closed beta.
agent_notes: API Key authentication is confirmed in the authentication section. Personal Access Tokens are in closed beta, indicating potential future expansion of auth methods. No mention of OAuth2. API access is self-serve with service user API keys.

one_liner: Higgsfield provides AI-driven media creation tools accessible via CLI and MCP integration.
gating_notes: No API keys to manage or configure. Authenticate through your Higgsfield account.
agent_notes: Authentication is done through the Higgsfield account without API keys. MCP integration is supported, indicating existing MCP. No mention of OAuth2 or API Key, only account-based authentication.

one_liner: Mermaid CLI is a command-line tool for generating diagrams from Mermaid definitions.
gating_notes: No authentication required for CLI usage.
agent_notes: The Mermaid CLI does not require authentication methods like OAuth2 or API Key as it is a local command-line tool. The CLI is self-serve with no gating requirements for usage.

one_liner: YouTube Transcript API provides seamless access to YouTube transcripts, search, channels, and playlists via REST API.
gating_notes: Get Started Free
agent_notes: Both OAuth2 and API Key are supported as per the Google API Console documentation. The API is self-serve as indicated by 'Get Started Free'.

one_liner: Grain is an AI-powered notetaking tool that captures and enriches meeting data for integration with AI tools.
gating_notes: Free forever, no credit card required.
agent_notes: Both OAuth2 and API Key authentication methods are supported as confirmed in the authentication section of the developer docs. The service offers a 'free forever' plan with no credit card required, indicating self-serve access. The API is RESTful with a moderate number of endpoints.
